about.title: TruckAI
about.subtitle: AI Smart Truck Assistant
about.desc: Built for Indian truck drivers, TruckAI is an AI-powered logistics intelligence platform that makes every journey safer, smarter, and more efficient — from NH1 to NH44.
about.missionText: To reduce road accidents in India by empowering truck drivers with AI-powered route intelligence, real-time alerts, and community support — making Indian highways safer for everyone.
about.visionText: A future where every truck driver in India has access to world-class navigation technology, emergency services, and a strong peer network — regardless of their technical background.

faqs.a: TruckAI is an AI-powered smart truck assistant designed specifically for Indian truck drivers. It provides real-time route planning, safety alerts, emergency SOS, and a driver community — all in one app.
Yes! TruckAI's core features including route planning, map view, emergency SOS, and community are completely free. Premium features like fleet analytics and API access are available in our Pro plan.
TruckAI works on any modern web browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari) on mobile, tablet, and desktop. We recommend Chrome on Android for the best mobile experience.

faqs.q: How does the route planner work?
faqs.a: Our route planner uses the OSRM (Open Source Routing Machine) API to calculate real driving routes along Indian roads. Enter your source and destination city, and the AI will suggest 3 optimized routes with safety scores.

faqs.q: Does TruckAI support all Indian cities?
faqs.a: Yes! We support all cities, towns, villages, and highways across India's 28 states and 8 UTs using OpenStreetMap data. Simply type the city name and it will auto-suggest matching locations.

faqs.q: Why does the route sometimes not match the actual road?
faqs.a: Route accuracy depends on OpenStreetMap data quality for that region. While major highways are highly accurate, remote areas may have less data. We recommend cross-checking with local knowledge.
Currently TruckAI requires an internet connection for route planning, map loading, and location search. Offline support is planned for a future update.

faqs.q: How does the Emergency SOS feature work?
faqs.a: When you press the SOS button, TruckAI captures your GPS location and shares it with your registered emergency contacts and the nearest police station. A 5-second countdown allows you to cancel accidental presses.

faqs.q: What if I don't have GPS signal?
faqs.a: TruckAI uses your last known GPS coordinates if live GPS is unavailable. We also display the approximate location based on your registered city for manual assistance.

faqs.q: Are the emergency contact numbers accurate?
faqs.a: Yes, all emergency numbers shown are official Government of India numbers: Police (100), Ambulance (108), Fire (101), and NHAI Highway Helpline (1033). These are updated regularly.

faqs.q: How do I share a road alert in the community?
faqs.a: Go to the Community page, type your alert in the chat input (e.g., 'Accident on NH48 near Surat'), and press Send. Other drivers will see your message in real-time.
Smart Stops are curated from verified sources including Google Places, Trucker forums, and our own driver network. Ratings and open/close status are updated regularly.

faqs.q: Can I add my own dhaba or repair shop?
faqs.a: Yes! Visit the Contact page and fill out a 'Business Listing' request. Our team will verify and add it within 48 hours.
TruckAI only stores your location when you explicitly use GPS features (current location, SOS). We never track your location in the background. All location data is encrypted.

faqs.q: How do I reset my password?
faqs.a: On the Login page, click 'Forgot Password', enter your email, and we'll send you a reset link within 2 minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.

faqs.q: Can I use TruckAI for my entire fleet?
faqs.a: Yes! TruckAI Pro offers fleet management features including multi-driver tracking, bulk route planning, and driver performance analytics. Contact us for enterprise pricing.
